channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Britain's Princess Kate climbs three mountains in 24 hours for charity
item.description: The challenge aimed to raise awareness for a charity she has supported since her own cancer treatment.

item.title: Key facts on birthright citizenship before Supreme Court decision
item.description: The ruling is among the most anticipated of the year.

item.title: Iran live updates: Israel strikes Hezbollah in southern Lebanon
item.description: A U.S. official said the U.S. and Iran agreed to halt attacks on Sunday.

item.title: Video shows U.S. rescue team pulling mother and baby from rubble in Venezuela
item.description: Hundreds of U.S. search and rescue workers are on the ground in Venezuela after deadly earthquakes hit the South American nation.
